title: ⚠ Conflict detected — Data source approach differs: Excel/SharePoint interim vs. direct SAP/Oracle EBS integration.
message: Data source approach differs: Excel/SharePoint interim vs. direct SAP/Oracle EBS integration.

details.quoted_new: initial DAISY solution will integrate with the current manual data (Excel files stored in SharePoint)
details.detail_engineer: NEW describes interim manual Excel integration pending IEO Power Apps adoption. EXISTING specifies production ingestion from SAP S/4HANA and Oracle EBS, suggesting different architectural direction.

title: ⚠ Count mismatch — Deliverable count changed from 4 (as of 24 Feb) to 3 (as of 25 Feb); data-quality monitoring descoped.
message: Deliverable count changed from 4 (as of 24 Feb) to 3 (as of 25 Feb); data-quality monitoring descoped.

details.quoted_new: back to three (3) as per the original 15 January scope. The data-quality monitoring component (added at the 10 February steering) is descoped
details.quoted_existing: tracking against the revised four-deliverable scope confirmed at the steering committee on 10 February
details.detail_engineer: Weekly status (24 Feb) lists 4 active deliverables including data-quality monitoring at 20% complete. Scope amendment (25 Feb) confirms reversion to 3 deliverables with data-quality monitoring descoped to Phase 2.

title: ⚠ Count mismatch — Deliverable count changed from 4 back to 3; data-quality monitoring added then removed.
message: Deliverable count changed from 4 back to 3; data-quality monitoring added then removed.

details.quoted_new: back to three (3) as per the original 15 January scope. The data-quality monitoring component (added at the 10 February steering) is descoped
details.quoted_existing: A fourth deliverable is added: data-quality monitoring
details.detail_engineer: 10 Feb steering added data-quality monitoring (4 deliverables). 25 Feb scope amendment descopes it, reverting to 3 original deliverables. Vendor (NorthWind) confirmed reversion.

title: ⚠ Decision reversal — Scope amendment reverts to original three deliverables; prior update referenced revised scope with data-quality monitoring added.
message: Scope amendment reverts to original three deliverables; prior update referenced revised scope with data-quality monitoring added.

details.quoted_new: reversion to the original project scope
details.detail_engineer: NEW passage confirms descoping of data-quality monitoring component and reversion to original 15 January baseline. EXISTING passage references 'revised steering committee scope' with implicit inclusion of the component later removed.
